raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta Baggatiba eet boh-
jā ar gruhtahm Behdahm/ un
kad tain buhs weens Dehls dſim-
mis/ tain ne buhs ne mas pee
Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Itt ka wiꞥſch no Mahtes
Meefahin nahzis/ tapatt wiꞥſch
pliks atgreesifees/ wiꞥſch ta no-
ees ka atnahzis/ wiꞥſch arrī ne
neins ne ko lihdī no tawa Dar-
ba/ ko wiꞥſch ar fawn Rohku
warretu aiſnest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ir fchi irr fanna
Mohziba/ ka wiꞥſch wiﬀascht
ta attak aiseet/ ka atnahzis.
Kahds Labbums tad winnam at-
lezz/ ka wiꞥſch irr welti strah-
dajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka wiꞥſch arrī wiﬀâß fa-
wäs Deenâs Tumfiba irr ehdis/
un leelâ Skumnibâ/ un Wahji-
bâ/ un Apskaifchanâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi tad/ ko es efimu
redsejs/ irr tas Labbums/ kas
jaufs irr? Ehst un dsert/ un Lab-
bumu baudibt pee wiﬀa fawa Darba/ ko kas darra appakſch Saules/ zik ilgi tas dſihwo/ ko Deewg tam dohd/ jo tas irr win-
na Dalka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo kurram Zilwekam
Deewg Baggatibu un Mantu
dewis irr/ un dohd tam Watku
no ta ehft/ un fawn Dalku jemt/
un preezatees pee fawa Darba/
tas irr weena Deewa Dahwana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo wiꞥſch dands ne at-
gahdajahs fawas Dſihwibas
Gruhtunu/ tapehz ka Deewg
winna Sirđi ar Preetu ap-
dahwana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "A irr weena fauna Lee-
ta/ ko es redsejn appakſch
Saules/ un taē ir dauds
rohdahs starp Zilwekeim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weens Wihrs/ kam Deewg
dewis irr Baggatibu/ un Man-
tu/ un Gohdu/ un winnam ne
irr preekſch fawas Sirđs ne
kahds Truhkums no wiﬀa/ kaß
winnam ween gribbahs/ un
Deewg ne dohd winnam Watku
no ta ehft/ bet weens fweſchajs
Wihrs to arehd/ tas irr Nelee-
tiba un fauna Mohziba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jepſchu weens Wihrs fimts
Behrnuß dsemdinatu/ un dauds
Gaddus dſihwotu/ ta ka wiꞥ-
na Dſihwiba ilga buhtu/ tomehr
winna Dwebfele ne pee-ehstu no
ta Labbuma/ ir tain ne kahdas
Behres nahktohs/ tad fakku es/
ka weens nelaika Behrns labbaks
irr/ neka tahds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ar Neleetibu * tas nahk/
un Tumfiba tas aiseet/ un ar
Tumfibu tohp winna Wahrdg
aisklahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir to Sauli tas ne irr re-
dsejs/ nedg atsinnis/ tain irr wai-
rak Duffefchanas neka winnam.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
